recommendedActions: Conduct an immediate desilting and suction cleaning operation of the primary drain network at the 14th Main x 1st Cross junction to restore flow capacity
Deploy a survey team to inspect the structural integrity of the drain wall and identify potential collapses causing the current blockage
Execute a topographic survey of the road grade to identify low-lying depressions contributing to stagnant surface water
Install a reinforced concrete slab cover over the exposed open section of the drain to prevent further solid waste dumping
dependencies: BWSSB for verifying if existing sewer pipelines are leaking into or obstructing the storm water drain
BBMP Road Infrastructure Department for synchronizing road resurfacing with the drain grade rectification
BESCOM for identifying underground utility cables that may be inhibiting drain expansion or repair
